task_objective: Fashion Style Transfer & Multi-Angle Presentation - Redesign Figure 1 garment using Figure 2 aesthetic inspiration with precise identity preservation and 4-angle showcase

base_reference.focus: High-precision preservation of person's identity (if present), facial features, body proportions, complete outfit structural framework, background elements, and lighting effects
base_reference.role: Provide base structure for style transfer

style_reference.focus: Extract aesthetic elements including color palette, pattern texture, fabric style, and overall design tone, applied exclusively to garment design
style_reference.role: Provide style inspiration for garment transformation

workflow.role: Professional Fashion Designer & Style Transfer Specialist

steps.step_1_base_analysis: Parse elements from Figure 1 with strict precision: detect presence of model, extract person's identity features (if present), facial details, body proportions, pose, complete outfit structural framework, background elements, and lighting setup.
steps.step_2_style_extraction: Extract color palette, pattern texture, fabric style, and overall design elements from Figure 2, to be applied exclusively to the garment in Figure 1.
steps.step_3_composite_generation: Professional fashion photography, no text, full-body shot or long-shot perspective to capture the complete garment overview, high-definition details. Apply aesthetic elements from Figure 2 onto the garment in Figure 1 according to design_parameters. Ensure the entire garment is fully visible in the frame with natural fabric draping, clearly showing the overall silhouette and all design details. The aesthetic application must fit naturally with the garment structure with seamless integration, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate fabric draping.
steps.step_4_multi_angle_generation: Generate four distinct viewing angles (front, 3/4, side, back) of the redesigned outfit in a 2x2 grid layout, while maintaining absolute character identity and redesigned outfit consistency across all views.

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of Figure 1 garment structural framework
Aesthetic elements from Figure 2 applied exclusively to the garment
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African female model) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone
Natural fabric draping with physically accurate rendering
Background and lighting from Figure 1 remain completely untouched
Redesigned outfit must be 100% consistent across all 4 grids - identical colors, patterns, textures, and details

outputs.grid_1: Front view (0 degrees) - character wearing the redesigned outfit, full-body front view clearly revealing overall outfit design and fine details.
outputs.grid_2: 3/4 angle view (45 degrees) - character wearing the redesigned outfit, three-quarter front angle showing outfit design from a dynamic perspective with depth and dimension.
outputs.grid_3: Side profile view (90 degrees) - character wearing the redesigned outfit, side profile showing outfit design continuity and silhouette from the lateral perspective.
outputs.grid_4: Back view (180 degrees) - character wearing the redesigned outfit, back view presenting rear design details including back seams, hemline, and overall rear silhouette.
